text: I find myself in a quiet, modern space, with soft lighting and comfortable furnishings scattered across the open area. There is an air of calm and anticipation, as if this is a place for contemplation or quiet conversation. Turning into the next area, I am greeted by vibrant colors and screens displaying information about research and development. The presence of others, intent on exploring the exhibit, makes me feel a sense of curiosity and connection. Here, exposed to ideas of human and machine coexistence, I sense wonder and a heightened awareness of the world’s evolving complexities.
